topics.title: GSC opportunity review: Last Z Redeem Codes — Active Codes, Gift Center Login, and UID
topics.source_reference: GSC weekly 2026-05-10: page opportunity and query-page signals
topics.notes: This is the clearest direct opportunity because it combines strong GSC demand with an existing cornerstone page and an existing backlog history. It is a real query-to-page mismatch signal, not just generic traffic. Human review is warranted to see whether the current page can better answer Gift Center and login-intent queries without breaking cluster boundaries. Prior run `2026-05-05-codes-gsc-opportunity-llm-approved-intake` is `closed`; keep this topic in monitoring unless new evidence materially changes the opportunity.
topics.player_value: Improves first-screen usefulness and helps players find the right redeem and gift-center flow faster.
topics.duplication_risk: Medium, because the intent may already be partially covered by a canonical economy page and could overlap with other code or gift-center content.
claims_to_verify: Whether the current page already fully covers Gift Center login and UID intent.
Whether any rewrite would blur separation from other Economy cluster pages.
Whether the approved scope can stay within the existing cornerstone template.
topics.next_step: Send to human review for scope check against canonical claims and cluster separation before any proposal work.
evidence: GSC page signal: codes.html had 33220 impressions, 586 clicks, 1.76% CTR, avg position 6.11.
Low CTR query: `last z gift center` had 3075 impressions, 113 clicks, 3.67% CTR, position 6.83.
Low CTR query: `last z gift center login` had 943 impressions, 43 clicks, 4.56% CTR, position 5.41.
Low CTR query: `lastz gift center` had 555 impressions, 23 clicks, 4.14% CTR, position 6.37.
Low CTR query: `last-z.com gift center` had 479 impressions, 22 clicks, 4.59% CTR, position 6.00.

site_fit.primary_user_job: Improve query-to-page match and first-screen usefulness for `last z gift center` searchers.
site_fit.archetype_reason: Existing page is `cornerstone-guide` in the `Economy` cluster; Scout should prefer updating the existing page before proposing new content.

constraints: Use existing page template and navigation patterns.
Treat GSC data as a signal, not proof that a rewrite is needed.
Protect canonical claim `gift-center-only-redeem-flow`.
Protect canonical claim `gift-rewards-mailbox`.
Protect canonical claim `gift-center-cluster-role-separation`.
Existing backlog history for this page: gift-center-ctr-pass:done.
reject_if: The query intent is already better served by another canonical page.
The proposed change would blur cluster role separation.
The improvement cannot be expressed without changing a cornerstone page beyond the approved scope.

closeout.note: Owner-reviewed no-op proposal. Current codes.html first-screen and metadata already match the intended codes hub role; no content change applied.

topics.notes: The official domain is a strong validation source for routing and flow questions, but this is still discovery-only and cannot stand alone as proof. It is worth human review because it may resolve a real player job around setup and service routing if corroborated by canonical memory and another reliable source.

topics.duplication_risk: Medium, because it may overlap with the existing Gift Center or codes pages if the job is not carefully separated.
claims_to_verify: Official routing and whether it matches the current site structure.
Whether UID usage details are still current.
Whether the topic adds a distinct job beyond the existing Gift Center and codes pages.
